productDisplayName: Diva Women Printed Multi Coloured Kurta
description: Composition Blue, grey, purple and white printed sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton fabric, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline and a buttoned chest placket Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurta and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look.
